top_signals.title: Adani Pressed by Judge for More Details on DOJ Move to Drop Case
top_signals.summary: A US judge pressed Gautam Adani for more details on the Justice Department’s move to dismiss a blockbuster criminal case against the Indian billionaire.
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.
